sub_modules.conv3d_coord_next: Combinational raster-scan coordinate and flat-address next-state generator.
sub_modules.conv3d_window_valid: Combinational valid-window detector for valid 3D convolution positions.
sub_modules.conv3d_window_gen: Combinational 3D stencil window extractor from the buffered input volume and current voxel.
sub_modules.conv3d_mac: Combinational multiply-accumulate array over the flattened 3D convolution window and kernel.
